title: Braised Tunisian Steak Tagine
description: A flavorful and hearty North African-inspired dish featuring a tender steak tagine, cooked in a rich and spicy sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the steak on both sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the steak from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, Tunisian spice blend, and crispy to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and diced tomatoes to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the steak to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2-3 hours, or until the steak is tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
